hero.description: AI4PEP unites data scientists, epidemiologists, mathematicians, and community health workers across Africa, Asia, LAC, and MENA to build AI tools that reach the people who need them most.

focusAreas.title: Responsible AI for preparedness
focusAreas.description: We support AI tools that are ethical, inclusive, locally relevant, and designed for real public health decision-making.

focusAreas.title: Regional research capacity
focusAreas.description: We strengthen networks across Africa, Asia, Latin America and the Caribbean, and the Middle East and North Africa.

focusAreas.title: Data-driven health action
focusAreas.description: We connect modelling, surveillance, community knowledge, and implementation science to support faster responses to outbreaks.

featured.title: Building AI systems that work with communities, not just for them.
featured.description: This starter content is intentionally editable. Update the English JSON files, run the Azure translation script, review the translated files, and deploy the multilingual website.
